executive_summary: The candidate displays strong technical command and high intelligibility, making them well-suited for roles requiring precision in English. While their grammatical foundation and speaking pace are solid, they should focus on refining their delivery by minimizing filler words and enhancing vocal modulation. Adopting more sophisticated discourse markers will further elevate their communication style, helping them transition from a functional to a persuasive speaker.
